query:
SELECT
                (SELECT COUNT(*)::BIGINT FROM friendships
                 WHERE status = 'accepted' AND (requester_id = $1 OR addressee_id = $1)) AS "caller!",
                (SELECT COUNT(*)::BIGINT FROM friendships
                 WHERE status = 'accepted' AND (requester_id = $2 OR addressee_id = $2)) AS "other!"
